abilities: It's just a scratch. You'll be fine.
I think justice could use a little nap. (putting Pharah using Barrage to sleep)
You're powered up, get in there. (self and target)
All better! For now. (healing ally to full HP)
You're fully healed. (healing ally to full HP)
You all look like you needed some healing.
My barrier can't take much more!
I'm pushing you to be better!
Come and get it, lavvy heads.
I've more where that came from!
Wall here! Let's stick 'em with it.
Who ordered the wall of death? (hostile)
Time for the Reckoning! (self and hostile)
The hunter lays a trap for her prey.
This seems like a good spot.
Fire in the hole! (self and hostile)
Ladies and gentlemen, start your engines! (allies)
Let the Kitsune guide you! (self and allies)
Healing administered at 128 beats per minute.
This will make you feel better!
Oh, let's break it down! (self and allies)
Let's put that pain to use!
Let's see if you can get past this!
Let me get you patched up.
You should be operating at peak performance levels.
Let's get you back in the fight!
Allow me to repair the damage.
Surrender to my will! (self and allies)
Justice rains from above! (self and hostile)
Suffer as I have! (self and hostile)
Don't worry, I will shield you!
I'm going whole hog! (self and hostile)
Come over here to heal up.
Come to me to get stabilized.
I've got you in my sights. (self and hostile)
This is a target rich environment!
Teleporter online. I have opened the path.
I have big plans for this.
I see great things ahead for this!
You should really watch your step!
No one can hide from my sight. (self and friendly)
I seem to have lost my temper.
The tide is with you! Dive in! (target)
Bask in the shadow of doubt.
You are your own worst enemy.
chatter: I am always ready to learn.
I'm eager to see what problems we encounter on this mission!
Mission readiness protocols engaged. I'm good to go!
More to do, more to learn.
Systems calibrated for maximum cooperative behavior.
Reconfiguring combat parameters for Overwatch Strike Team operations. (teammates are all Overwatch members)
On your toes and ready to go!
Take every obstacle as an opportunity to learn.
I always like it when a mission is going successfully.
This is going well. Let's try to keep it up.
Things could be going better, but I remain optimistic.
This mission is more difficult than I predicted.
We may need to consider adapting our strategy.
Everyone stay focused. This is it.
We have one more chance. Let's make it count.
I can do better than that!
I have a lot to think about.
That was a very good lesson.
And things were going so well. (after multi-kill)
I'll try to pick up where I left off. (after multi-kill)
Let's hope the others get back quickly!
The team should be reassembling soon.
Where'd that tumbleweed come from? (while ally Cassidy uses Deadeye)
call-outs: Just hold out a little longer!
Looks like our strategy's effective. Keep it up!
We have the upper hand. Let's keep it that way!
We haven't lost yet. What's our game plan?
We're almost out of time. Any new ideas?
We're low on time. Let's try something!
eliminations: Guess where I learned that one?
You're one of Talon's best? Interesting... (vs. any Talon member)
Oh! Do I need to be nerfed? (vs. D.Va )
Your definition of "perfect" is inaccurate. (vs. Domina )
"Only through conflict do we evolve." (vs. Doomfist )
This is not how Dr. Liao remembered you. (vs. Emre )
It seems we're both 'built different'. (vs. Hazard )
So you can be matched. (vs. Hazard )
Sorry! I mean... mrrow! (vs. Jetpack Cat )
Perhaps you need to learn more quickly. (vs. Juno )
"Mercy"? I haven't learned that, yet. (vs. Mercy )
Hm... what is that melody? (vs. Sigma )
It's not like you to be careless. (vs. Sojourn )
Time for a change in leadership. (vs. Sojourn )
It's a good thing my circuitry is waterproof! (vs. Wuyang )
Air-to-air engagement successful. (eliminating airborne enemy while airborne)
Looks like I had the high ground. (eliminating airborne enemy while airborne)
Aerial superiority achieved. (eliminating airborne Pharah while airborne)
Mace to the face! (as a duplicated Brigitte , eliminating her using Power Flail)
Sorry, Papa! I mean... Torbjörn! (as a duplicated Brigitte , eliminating Torbjörn )
That one's for Genji, "brother." (as a duplicated Genji , eliminating Hanzo using Dash)
Have I done that before? Hm. (as a duplicated Hanzo , eliminating Genji using Storm Arrow)
Long live the queen! (as a duplicated Junker Queen , eliminating her using Rampage)
You have some firepower, Captain. (as a duplicated Sojourn , eliminating her using Railgun)
I'm putting you on ice this time! (as a duplicated Soldier: 76 , eliminating him using Helix Rockets)
Does that make me a Lindholm? (as a duplicated Torbjörn , eliminating him using Turret)
No hard feelings, love? Haha! (as a duplicated Tracer , eliminating her using Pulse Bomb)
Ahh, did that sting? (as a duplicated Widowmaker , eliminating her using Venom Mine)
Ha ha ha ha ha. (as a duplicated Wrecking Ball , eliminating him using Piledriver)
We have removed all enemy targets.
Learning from mistakes is crucial for growth.
Revenge served cold, just like you taught me. (eliminating Cassidy )
I am more durable than I look!
That didn't sound good at all!
Dr. Liao would've wanted that. (eliminating Moira using Coalescence)
I hope you prepared a parachute!
Thank you for testing the ledge for me!
I thought you knew how to fly? (eliminating Echo , Pharah or Mercy )
Your creator will be pleased! (to Bastion or Orisa )
interactions: Ashe : I can't believe we lost such valuable cargo. You would've fetched a fine sum. Echo : My condolences for your loss. Ashe : Considering that you have to deal with Cole, I'd say it's really your loss.
Echo : You know, I saved Cole's life once. Ashe : Am I supposed to be thankful for that?
Bastion : (sad beeps) Echo : (comforting beeps) Bastion : (grateful beeps) Echo : Any time, my friend. Any time.
Brigitte : If you don't mind me asking, what is your armor made of? Echo : Your father has my blueprints. Why don't you see for yourself? I'd hate to spoil the surprise.
Echo : Cole Cassidy, Cole Cassidy, Cole Cassidy. Cassidy : You called? Echo : I just like saying your name, that's all.
Echo : I think I can pull off a cowboy hat. Cassidy : Want me to buy you one? Echo : No need. I'll just borrow yours.
Echo : If you'd like, I could train with you. Facing yourself can help you improve. D.Va : Oh, finally! A balanced 1v1!
Echo : Hana, what does kimchi taste like? D.Va : It's salty and spicy and garlicky! * sigh * It's yummy fried, too. Echo : Fried? Interesting! D.Va : Aw, now I'm hungry!

Echo : Overwatch is back. Why not return to search and rescue? Freja : Who says I want to go back? Echo : But helping people was your purpose. You were among the best. Freja : People change. I wouldn't expect a bot to understand.

Hazard : You ever think of markin' up that chassis of yours? I know a good tattoo artist. Echo : I hadn't considered decoration. I don't know what I would want. Hazard : Well, what do you like? Echo : I like... myself. Just as I am.

Echo : I have questions about Inti fighting styles. Illari : I'm... not qualified to answer them. Echo : The records shows you're a prodigy. Perhaps you're not giving yourself enough credit. Illari : Keep reading those records. You'll see how much credit I deserve.
Junkrat : Sticky bombs? What a fantastic idea! How do they work? Echo : That is classified information. Junkrat : No worries. I'll figure it out on me own. All I need is some glue.

Echo : Whose voice were you listening to earlier, Juno? Juno : My mother's. It's just a recording, but I keep wishing she will have more to say. Echo : Would you like me to store it in my databanks? I would gladly play it for you anytime. Juno : Yes please. Thank you, Echo.

Echo : How are you adjusting to Earth? Juno : My family told me many stories, but it is still different than I expected. Echo : Another's experience are not the same as your own. In time, you will form your own conclusions.

Juno : Do you have information about Jurong ? It was by mother's birthplace. Echo : Yes. Dr. Liao had fond memories of her time attending university there. Juno : (Gasp) You must tell me everything you know!

Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Echo : My current favorite is a really big dog used to ward off bears. My current favorite is Triceratops. My current favorite is the rhinoceros. My current favorite is the tiger shark. My current favorite is the dragonfly. My current favorite is the penguin. My current favorite is the Jack Russell terrier. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Echo : I have been studying the composition of your songs. Lúcio : Studying? Nah, you've got to feel and enjoy the music! Echo : I enjoy the mathematics.

Lifeweaver : It's monstrous that you were kept locked up for so long. Echo : It didn't feel very long to me. Lifeweaver : Well, should your jailers ever come knocking again, I know a place you'd be safe.

Echo : Could you describe the taste of chicken rice? Mei : Oh, it's very tender and tasty but... subtle? Echo : Thank you. It was Dr. Liao's favorite dish. Mei : I'll have some and explain it better next time!
Echo : Dr. Liao was not fond of you. Moira : Was she any fonder of you? Echo : Of course. I was her life's work. Moira : It seemed to me she was far more taken with your predecessor .
Echo : I've heard much of your creator. What is she like? Orisa : Efi 's belief in me is humbling. She inspires me to improve each day. Echo : I am... very pleased to hear that.
Ramattra: Are you satisfied following humans around like an observant pet? Echo: There's no shame in learning from others. Try it sometime!

Echo : You... are an R-7000 unit. The ones humans call... um... Ramattra : Ravagers , yes. "Squad killers." And... ruder things. Echo : Does it trouble you, being so feared and hated? Ramattra : Once. Now, it gives me a warm little feeling inside.

Ramattra : It's a shame none of us have ever met Aurora , your predecessor. Echo : I hear that often. * ahem * What would you have asked her? Ramattra : The same thing I ask her every day. I wish she could answer.

Echo : Why did you choose the name " Null Sector "? Ramattra : Because we defy the numbers humans gave us. We are zeroes, undefined. Echo : Is that not its own struggle? Ramattra : Of course, I expect you know that better than anyone.
Reaper : Imitate me, and you'll regret it. Echo : "Imitate me, and you'll regret it." Reaper : That's... not bad, actually.
Echo : I do not understand why you enjoy inflicting pain. Reaper : I'm an enigma. Deal with it.
Sojourn : Bet it's fun, hanging out in the sky. Echo : I do enjoy the perspective and tactical advantages, yes. Sojourn : Do you... ever pretend you're a bird? Echo : Constantly!
Sojourn : How are you still so optimistic, Echo? Echo : It's not always easy, but Dr. Liao created me to improve the world. Sojourn : She'd be proud of you.
Echo : You are not alone. Soldier: 76 : I don't need your pity. Echo : It's not pity. I know how it feels to be alone for a long time.
Echo : Any luck getting past my fourth firewall yet? Sombra : Already done. Your fifth's tricky, though. Echo : Do you want a hint? Sombra : * scoff * Don't you dare.
Echo : When I don't replicate human behaviors, I am misunderstood. Are my algorithms insufficient? Symmetra : You operate on a level inaccessible to others. I do not see that as a weakness.

Echo : Thank you, Torbjörn. I've learned much from observing you. Torbjörn : Well, I'm known to be an excellent teacher. Echo : Yes, I believe I've grasped what not to do in stressful situations. Torbjörn : You shouldn't believe everything Mercy says, y'know.
Echo : I learn so much from observing you. Tracer : Aw, likewise! Wait, in a good way, right? Echo : Right? Tracer : Are you copying me? Echo : Me?

Venture: No way... you're Echo! Like, Mina Liao 's Echo! Oh, I have so many questions for you! Echo: I... suppose I could answer them. Venture: Awesome! I don't even know where to start, uh, I mean, um... what was she like? Echo: She was... like me.

Echo: I understand you study omnic archaelogy. Venture: It's only my favorite specialization! Echo: What do you know of the Awakening ? Could Aurora's sentience be replicated? Venture: ...That one... might be beyond my expertise.

Echo: ...and, unlike with base 10, you begin at the rightmost number and work left. Venture: Right. But... when you did you pick your pronouns? Did you... download those? Echo: Do you believe we are discussing "non-binary", rather than the binary counting system? Venture: Oh! Uh... yeah.
Echo : Is peanut butter that delicious? Winston : It's peanuty buttery heaven! Echo : But my analysis shows me it's high in trans saturated fats. Winston : Did Athena put you up to this?
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Echo : This is not, perhaps, the best time.
Winston : Here's another one. What sickness do pilots usually get? Echo : Hmm, what? Winston : The flew! Echo : I'm glad that's impossible for me.
Echo : Winston, have you ever noticed any similarities between Athena and me? Winston : Uh... you both have a... dry sense of humor. Echo : Perhaps that is programming we share.

Echo : May I borrow your copy of Thucydides' History sometime? Wrecking Ball : * hamster noises * Unfortunately, that is not possible. Echo : I can wait until you're done with it. Wrecking Ball : * hamster noises * It was shredded for bedding.
map-specific: I heard their fish cakes here are famous!
Ooh. I'd like to see my name in lights one day.
Space really puts the world in a new perspective.
Pharah would be proud of that one.
This place confuses me. If it is so hostile to life, why does everyone not leave?
I would love to go to the night market after this!
The transit system here is fascinating. So much automation, so many destinations. I hope to study it someday.
The city that never sleeps? That sounds like me.
Dr. Liao told me of her journey here. It is strange to see it with my own eyes.
You say they have advanced robotics here. Have they built anyone like me?
It's a completely different view outside the crate!
I'm sensing a strange energy here. It feels... pure.
Anubis is an interesting case... to think a single program could have such a profound effect on the world.
